appName.message: Bookmark Search - Lightning-fast bookmark manager & finder

appDesc.message: Hit Ctrl/Cmd+Space on any page to pop up a search box. Match across titles, URLs, and folder paths; jump to any of the top 9 results with a number key. Right-click or Alt+Enter opens an action menu (copy link, open in new window, delete). Four switchable themes, kept in sync with your browser bookmarks automatically.
